events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Conclusion: **fail** — an expired-calibration gauge invalidates the pressure test under ASME B31.3 §345 (test pressure readings can't be verified as accurate), so the test must be redone with a properly calibrated gauge before the system can be accepted.
